productPositioning: Buildchain is the CI/CD and release-governance tool product for the Kungfu ecosystem.

requiredArtifacts.title: site manifest
requiredArtifacts.summary: Product name, version, git SHA, exact and floating refs, navigation, machine artifacts, schema URLs, and release provenance.

requiredArtifacts.title: CLI command registry
requiredArtifacts.summary: Commands, flags, defaults, exit codes, JSON output schemas, and examples generated from the real CLI definitions.

requiredArtifacts.title: workflow/action registry
requiredArtifacts.summary: Reusable workflow and action inputs, outputs, permissions, and recommended pinning metadata.

requiredArtifacts.title: config schema
requiredArtifacts.summary: buildchain.toml schema, normalized examples, and config explain output.

requiredArtifacts.title: release model facts
requiredArtifacts.summary: Branch, tag, channel, promotion, and publish-transaction state machines verified by code or fixtures.

requiredArtifacts.title: artifact/evidence schemas
requiredArtifacts.summary: Build summaries, artifact manifests, release manifests, publish evidence, web-surface deployment manifests, and log event JSONL.

requiredArtifacts.title: tested recipes
requiredArtifacts.summary: Node package, native/CMake, libnode anchored package, web-surface site, publish transaction, and Buildchain self-dogfood recipes.

requiredArtifacts.title: release provenance
requiredArtifacts.summary: Buildchain package version, git SHA, exact tag, floating tag, package digest, and docs bundle hash.

requiredArtifacts.title: agent index
requiredArtifacts.summary: llms.txt, llms-full.txt, and JSON index entries for stable agent access.
